reason: The QA report and evidence confirm that the implemented Agent Soul feature was exercised in real operator and agent scenarios across CLI, HTTP, UDS, restart recovery, CAS conflicts, rollback/delete behavior, Heartbeat wake/status/session health, generated consumer boundaries, and live Codex provider sessions. All eight QA cases are passed or passed with a documented provider-output observation. BUG-004, found during real HTTP agent-context testing, was fixed and covered by focused Go tests. Final make verify passed with the monorepo gate, including 7719 Go tests and boundary checks.
provider_observation: Live Codex output followed the authored evidence-first/conservative Soul shape but mangled literal digest transcription. Runtime context surfaces returned the exact digest correctly, so digest transcription was documented as provider-output risk rather than counted as deterministic runtime proof.
